title: Vinland Enhanced
description: The official modpack for the Vinland server, for Fabric!
body:
# Vinland Enhanced
A modpack designed to **improve your gaming experience** on the Vinland server, as well as for enjoyable play on **other servers or in the local Minecraft world**. This modpack is made with four main features (**Optimization, Visual and gameplay enhancements, Improved RP Experience, Tools for Content Makers**) in mind that will greatly improve your gaming experience. **Everything** is already set up to make your game as **comfortable** as possible. **You just need to install this build and enjoy the game!**

## Main Features:

### Optimization
**Modpack "Vinland Enhanced"** includes a number of optimizations that guarantee **stable and smooth game play** even on servers with high load. The modpack also supports almost **all OptiFine features**, **including shaders**, **capes**, **zoom**, and **support for resourcepacks that require OptiFine**. We pay special attention to performance optimization to ensure **the most comfortable gaming environment**.

<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.20.4-0.5.8) (A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options/version/mc1.20.4-1.7.2) (Alternative Options Menu for Sodium)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium/version/1.0.30+mc1.20.4) (Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra/version/mc1.20.4-0.5.4) (A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.)
- [MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling/version/0.24.0) (A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance)
- [PurpurClient](https://modrinth.com/mod/purpurclient) (Fixes client-side vanilla bugs)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast/version/1.2.14+1.20.4-fabric) (Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/version/13.0.121+fabric) (Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.)
- [Starlight (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight/version/1.1.3+1.20.4) (Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.10.20+kotlin.1.9.24) (This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.)
- [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada/version/0.7.2+1.20.2-1.20.4) (Confusing, Interesting and Considerably Agnostic Development Aid)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps/version/3.4.3) (Minecraft is in the background or idle.)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby/version/5.1.0+mc1.20.4) (Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling/version/1.6.4-1.20.4) (Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix/version/v1.1.5) (A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.97.0+1.20.4) (Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric/version/0.2.0+alpha.11.67+1.20.4) (A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls/version/4.0.3+mc1.20.4-fabric) (Makes resource packs load in the background, allowing you to do other things while waiting!)
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib/version/0.12.6+1.20.3) (A general utility, GUI and config library for modding on Fabric and Quilt)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton/version/0.2.6) (A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/version/mc1.20.4-0.12.1) (No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod)
- [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry/version/1.8.0) (Disable the telemetry introduced in 21w38a)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core/version/6.0.3-fabric) (Memory usage optimizations)
- [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric/version/0.2.0+beta.7.139+1.20.4) (A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts.)
- [M.R.U](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru/version/0.4.0+1.20.4) (Mineblock's Repeated Utilities)


</details>



### Visual and gameplay enhancements
Through various shaders, resource packs, and mods, we've given the world of Minecraft more **vibrant, detailed imagery and improved gameplay**. From high-quality textures to new game mechanics and improved atmosphere, every aspect of visual and gameplay design has been carefully crafted to create an **immersive gaming experience**.

<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

- [Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/harvest/version/1.3.1) (Break fully grown crops by right-clicking them)
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) (A mod that adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items.)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) (A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.)
- [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) (Allows resource packs to define custom skyboxes.)
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) (Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount)
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge.)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/version/3.0.0-beta.4+1.20.2) (A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures)
- [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard/version/1.0.9+fabric) (Screenshots taken are copied to the clipboard.)
- [Glowing Torchflower](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowing-torchflower/version/1.0.0) (Mod that make Torchflower glow)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip/version/4.0.8+1.20.4-fabric) (View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory)
- [Axolotl Buckets](https://modrinth.com/mod/axolotl-buckets/version/1.2.0+1.20) (Show the color and age of axolotls when in buckets.)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory/version/1.3.0) (Increases the maximum length of chat history.)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3/version/9.0.2) (BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.)
- [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view/version/1.20.x-0.0.5-fabric) (See your held items when in a moving boat!)
- [Beenfo](https://modrinth.com/plugin/beenfo/version/1.20.4-fabric0.91.2-1.3.4) (Show number of bees and honey level in hives and nests)
- [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation/version/1.0.5) (Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation.)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/version/2.5.1+mc1.20.3) (Food/hunger-related HUD improvements)
- [AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo/version/1.20.4-fabric0.91.2-1.4) (Show more information about advancement requirements)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload/version/1.5.10+1.20.3) (Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages)
- [Edgeless Chat Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/edgeless-chat-screen/version/1.1.2-fabric1.20) (Why not having an edgeless chat screen?)
- [Isometric Renders](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders/version/0.4.7+1.20.3) (Creates high-resolution isometric screenshots of game objects)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/17.3.0.52) (JEI - View Items and Recipes)
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars/version/1.0.4) (Adds customizable bars to the status effects overlay to show the remaining duration of effects.)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/2.3.4+1.20.4) (A dynamic lights mod for Fabric.)
- [Blur+ (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric/version/3.2.0) (Adds a blur effect to all GUI backgrounds - now for Fabric (and Quilt)!)
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps/version/1.11.3) (..An Overly complicated Sound Mod...)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris/version/1.7.0+1.20.4) (A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs)
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats/version/3.9.7+fabric-1.20.4) (A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful.)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/9.2.0-beta.2) (Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves/version/1.15.6+1.20.1) (Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations/version/1.7.3) (Bringing first-person animations to the third-person)
- [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound/version/0.7.0+1.20.4) (A highly configurable sound overhaul mod that adds new sound effects while improving vanilla sounds too. A spiritual continuation of ExtraSounds.)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality/version/0.7.4+1.20.4) (Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify/version/2.13.4+1.20.4) (A zoom mod with infinite customizability.)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads/version/0.10.32) (See who you're chatting with!)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/version/1.14) (Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models)
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper/version/0.6.3) (Inventory update concept for hotswapping items.)
- [DeathLog](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog/version/0.3.2+1.20.3) (Keeps track of the many embarrassing times you died)
- [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade/version/13.3.1) (Shows information about what you are looking at. (Hwyla/Waila fork for Minecraft 1.16+))
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/version/1.1.5+1.20.4) (Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs))
- [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me/version/8.0.0+1.20.4) (Authenticate yourself and re-validate your session)
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers/version/1.6.4) (Render the player skin layer in 3d!)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Included shaders</summary>

- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/r5.1.1) (Best Solution. Keeps a balance of vanilla and visuals)
- [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla/version/1.3.5) (Good alternative)
- [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels/gallery) (Very nice shaders, but can put a lot of load on the device) 
- [Noble Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/noble) (An option for fans of hyperrealism. Can load the device heavily!)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included resourcespacks</summary>

- [xali's Potion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potion/version/1.0.0) (Changed potion textures)
- [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode/version/2024.4.0-1.20.5) (🌙 The Dark Mode Resource Pack for Minecraft: Java Edition)
- [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass/version/1.20.5) (Makes grass and related blocks use the top texture on the sides. Works with other resource packs!)
- [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons/gallery) (Introduces icons throughout different aspects of the game)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (Make your game like the trailers! Dynamic animated entities to freshen your Minecraft experience.)
- [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars) (New improved boss bars!)
  
</details>




### Improved RP Experience
The Vinland Enhanced modpack includes a number of modifications aimed at **improving the role-playing experience**. New mechanics and features will allow you to dive even deeper into the game's fascinating world, creating unique stories and characters.

<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

- [Ears (+ Snouts/Muzzles, Tails, Horns, Wings, and More)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ears/version/1.4.6+fabric-1.20.2) (More skin customization options for just about every version + skin back​ports/fixes for pre-1.9 versions.)
- [Show Me Your Skin!](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin/version/1.9.0+1.20.4) (A mod to hide or customize armor rendering.)
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft/version/2.4.0-a.f140890e) (Create your own emotes in Minecraft.)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/fabric-1.20.4-2.5.14) (A working voice chat in Minecraft!)
- [Voice Chat Soundboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/voicechat-soundboard/version/0.2.2) (Adds a client-side soundboard to Simple Voice Chat)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes/version/1.5.3+1.20.2) (Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods)

</details>



### Additional Tools for Content Makers
For those who love to create content, modpack "Vinland Enhanced" provides **additional tools and opportunities** to realize their creative ideas in the game world.

<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

- [Perspective Mod Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/perspective-mod-redux/version/fabric-1.17-0.0.5_01) (360 degree third person view)
- [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils/version/fabric-1.20.4-1.0.9) (Helpful camera utilities)
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod/version/1.20.4-2.6.15) (A Minecraft Mod to record, relive and share your experience.)

</details>

## I still have questions!
**You can ask all questions, ideas and suggestions on our [official Discord server](https://discord.gg/hYMm7Euk)!**
